title: D3D12 Upload Heap Host Write Probe

question.ja: D3D12 の UPLOAD heap への CPU 書き込み自体は、通常 RAM 書き込みや memcpy と比べてどれくらい遅いか。UPLOAD 書き込みが PCIe 経由のような host-write 速度を示すのか。
question.en: How slow is direct CPU writing into a D3D12 UPLOAD heap compared with normal RAM writes and memcpy? Does host writing to the UPLOAD heap itself behave like a PCIe-limited path?

focus: Host-side throughput into mapped UPLOAD heap memory
Comparison against normal RAM memset, pattern fill, and memcpy
Separating CPU-side preparation cost from GPU copy timing

considerations.ja: これは GPU copy bench ではなく host-write probe。CPU が UPLOAD heap をどう書けるかを見る。
considerations.en: This is a host-write probe, not a GPU copy benchmark. It measures how the CPU can write into the UPLOAD heap.

considerations.ja: UPLOAD heap は abstracted heap type なので、速度だけで物理経路を断定しない。まず normal RAM との差を見る。
considerations.en: UPLOAD is an abstracted heap type, so speed alone does not prove the physical path. The first comparison is against normal RAM behavior.

considerations.ja: memset/memcpy と pattern fill を分けて、遅さがストア先ではなくデータ生成にある可能性も切り分ける。
considerations.en: memset/memcpy and pattern fill are separated so we can distinguish slow stores from slow data generation.
